2606.30645.title: VLK: Learning Humanoid Loco-Manipulation from Synthetic Interactions in Reconstructed Scenes
2606.30645.paper_summary: Perception-based humanoid loco-manipulation requires connecting egocentric observations and task instructions to whole-body motion. Learning this mapping requires synchronized egocentric images, language commands, and robot-compatible kinematic trajectories, yet no existing data source provides this complete tuple at scale. We address this bottleneck by generating vision-language-kinematics (VLK) supervision synthetically in reconstructed scenes. Our pipeline leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting to reconstruct metric-scale indoor environments, synthesizes navigation and object-interaction trajectories using privileged scene information, and renders paired egocentric observations after the fact. We produce 48,000 paired trajectories with no human intervention and train a VLK policy that predicts short-horizon whole-body kinematic trajectories. A whole-body tracker converts these predictions into actions on the physical humanoid. We evaluate on the physical Unitree G1 performing navigation and single-object transport, demonstrating that synthesized interactions in reconstructed scenes provide effective supervision for sim-to-real perception-based humanoid loco-manipulation. Project Website: https://vision-language-kinematics.github.io/
2606.30645.paper_summary_zh: 感知基礎的人形運動操控需要將自我中心的觀察與任務指令連結到全身運動。學習這種映射需要同步的自我中心影像、語言指令和機器人兼容的運動學軌跡，但現有的數據來源並未在規模上提供這種完整的元組。我們通過在重建場景中合成視覺-語言-運動學（VLK）監督來解決這一瓶頸。我們的流程利用 3D 高斯散點重建度量尺度的室內環境，使用特權場景信息合成導航和物體互動軌跡，並在事後渲染配對的自我中心觀察。我們生成了 48,000 條配對軌跡，無需人工干預，並訓練了一個 VLK 策略，預測短期全身運動學軌跡。全身追蹤器將這些預測轉換為物理人形的動作。我們在物理 Unitree G1 上進行導航和單物體運輸的評估，證明在重建場景中合成的互動為基於感知的人形運動操控提供了有效的監督。項目網站：https://vision-language-kinematics.github.io/
2606.30645.author: Yen-Jen Wang et.al.
2606.30645.authors: Yen-Jen Wang, Jiaman Li, Sirui Chen, Takara E. Truong, Pei Xu, Pieter Abbeel, Rocky Duan, Koushil Sreenath, Angjoo Kanazawa, Carmelo Sferrazza, Guanya Shi, Karen Liu
